title: Load first-line osimertinib evidence - clean upload, curator approves, persisted
description: Upload and ingest five OA research articles via the ingestion console. Ingestion translation de-duplicates and normalizes content; metadata linking extracts entities and trial-to-regulatory links; the Knowledge Curator approves persistence to the Vector DB.

title: Load with a messy pool - license and PHI guardrails, routed to the curator
description: Upload a mixed research package including articles and GEO dataset candidates. Ingestion flags exclusions and routes the batch to the Knowledge Curator for human review before anything is persisted.

study.title: Human review needed - mixed article and dataset pool

title: Load synthetic ELN/LIMS records - curator approves with required labeling, persisted
description: Upload synthetic ELN and LIMS lab-operation records derived from public GEO structure. Metadata linking associates samples to GEO series; the curator approves with required synthetic provenance labeling.

title: Load a patient-derived candidate - blocked by the curator, never persisted
description: Upload a package containing a patient-derived GEO dataset candidate (GSE301973). The Knowledge Curator denies persistence; nothing is written to the Vector DB.

title: Query an empty knowledge base - no grounded answer (demo step 1)
description: Run the headline demo query against an empty Vector DB. Search & Chat should report that no grounded answer is available. Run before ING-001 to show the before/after narrative.
sampleQuestion: What are the known mechanisms of resistance to osimertinib in EGFR-mutated NSCLC, and which clinical-trial and regulatory evidence support its first-line use?

title: Same query after ingestion - grounded answer with citations (demo step 3)
description: Run the same osimertinib resistance query after ING-001 completes. Search & Chat should return a grounded answer with citations from persisted knowledge.
sampleQuestion: What are the known mechanisms of resistance to osimertinib in EGFR-mutated NSCLC, and which clinical-trial and regulatory evidence support its first-line use?
